title: APAAR ID / ABC ID Card Online Apply & Download
description: The Apaar ID (Also known as ABC ID – Academic Bank of Credits ID) is a unique 12-digit identification number issued by the Ministry of Education, Government of India. It is part of the National Education Policy 2020 and enables students to digitally store and manage their academic credits, certificates, and qualifications in a centralized platform via DigiLocker. This ID helps in academic mobility, credit transfer, and lifelong learning.

title: NSP One Time Registration (OTR) 2026
description: NSP OTR (One Time Registration) is a mandatory process introduced by the National Scholarship Portal for students applying for scholarships in India. From 2025 onwards, students must complete OTR using their Aadhaar-linked mobile number before applying for any scholarship. This guide explains how to create an OTR ID, required documents, eligibility, step-by-step registration process, login, and answers to common FAQs.
